name: dairy-agent
description: AI agent for dairy farm management (read/write tool split with human-in-the-loop confirmation).

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,angular -c blue,red "npm run dev -w server" "npm run start -w web-angular"
scripts.dev:angular: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,angular -c blue,red "npm run dev -w server" "npm run start -w web-angular"
scripts.build:angular: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w web-angular
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w server
